form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[调拨单号] orgId[业务组织] assetId[资产] businessDate[业务日期] fromDate[生效起始日] thruDate[生效截止日] =========>transfer[调拨信息]====== fromDepartmentId[源部门] toDepartmentId[目标部门] fromStaffId[源使用人] toStaffId[目标使用人] fromLocationId[源地点] toLocationId[目标地点] handlerId[经办人] =========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] postedAt[过账时间] postedBy[过账人] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[调拨单号] orgId[业务组织] assetId[资产] businessDate[业务日期] fromDate[生效起始日] thruDate[生效截止日] =========>transfer[调拨信息]====== fromDepartmentId[源部门] toDepartmentId[目标部门] fromStaffId[源使用人] toStaffId[目标使用人] fromLocationId[源地点] toLocationId[目标地点] handlerId[经办人] =========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] postedAt[过账时间] postedBy[过账人] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[调拨单号] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] assetId[资产] fromDepartmentId[源部门] toDepartmentId[目标部门]
